news.title: Lupin Ltd declines for the fifth consecutive session, reflecting ongoing weakness.
news.summary: Lupin Ltd declines for the fifth consecutive session, reflecting ongoing weakness.

news.title:
Lupin, Sun Pharma, Torrent Pharma, CCL Products, and Karnataka Bank show resilience amid market volatility, bucking broader sell-off trends.
Strong fundamentals like steady growth, robust pipelines, and strategic moves drive their performance; suitability for long-term leadership remains key.
news.summary:
Lupin, Sun Pharma, Torrent Pharma, CCL Products, and Karnataka Bank show resilience amid market volatility, bucking broader sell-off trends.
Strong fundamentals like steady growth, robust pipelines, and strategic moves drive their performance; suitability for long-term leadership remains key.

news.title:
Indian pharma giants, including Dr. Reddy's and Lupin, embrace AI for drug discovery, trials, and manufacturing.
ET explores AI's impact on pharma with leaders from PwC India, Dr. Reddy's, and Lupin.
news.summary:
Indian pharma giants, including Dr. Reddy's and Lupin, embrace AI for drug discovery, trials, and manufacturing.
ET explores AI's impact on pharma with leaders from PwC India, Dr. Reddy's, and Lupin.

news.title:
Lupin completes acquisition of VISUfarma, a European ophthalmology specialist.
This strengthens Lupin's presence in Italy, UK, Spain, Germany, and France.
news.summary:
Lupin completes acquisition of VISUfarma, a European ophthalmology specialist.
This strengthens Lupin's presence in Italy, UK, Spain, Germany, and France.

news.title:
IOCL saw record crude throughput of 75.4 MMT and pipeline throughput at 105.3 MMT in FY26.
Lupin's arm to acquire 43.4% in Philippines' MPPI for $39.6M; auto and bank stocks also in focus.
news.summary:
IOCL saw record crude throughput of 75.4 MMT and pipeline throughput at 105.3 MMT in FY26.
Lupin's arm to acquire 43.4% in Philippines' MPPI for $39.6M; auto and bank stocks also in focus.

news.title:
Lupin's subsidiary Nanomi B.V. to acquire 43.4% stake in MPPI.
This move aims to enhance Lupin's market presence in the Philippines pharma sector.
news.summary:
Lupin's subsidiary Nanomi B.V. to acquire 43.4% stake in MPPI.
This move aims to enhance Lupin's market presence in the Philippines pharma sector.

news.title: Lupin's subsidiary Nanomi B.V. acquired VISUfarma B.V., effective April 1, 2026.
news.summary: Lupin's subsidiary Nanomi B.V. acquired VISUfarma B.V., effective April 1, 2026.

news.title:
Lupin Ltd. witnessed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 236.5 cr for 1,031,642 shares.
The trade was executed at Rs. 2,292.8 per share.
news.summary:
Lupin Ltd. witnessed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 236.5 cr for 1,031,642 shares.
The trade was executed at Rs. 2,292.8 per share.

news.title:
Lupin gets tentative US FDA nod for Sugammadex injection.
Sugammadex reverses muscle relaxation from rocuronium or vecuronium in surgeries.
news.summary:
Lupin gets tentative US FDA nod for Sugammadex injection.
Sugammadex reverses muscle relaxation from rocuronium or vecuronium in surgeries.

news.title:
Lupin gets US FDA tentative approval for Sugammadex Injection.
Approval includes 200mg/2mL and 500mg/5mL vials, bioequivalent to Merck's Bridion.
news.summary:
Lupin gets US FDA tentative approval for Sugammadex Injection.
Approval includes 200mg/2mL and 500mg/5mL vials, bioequivalent to Merck's Bridion.

news.title:
Lupin's subsidiary MPPI bought back 2.8M shares; Nanomi didn't participate.
Nanomi's stake in MPPI increased from 51% to 56.3%; MPPI's turnover was PHP 2,096.6M.
news.summary:
Lupin's subsidiary MPPI bought back 2.8M shares; Nanomi didn't participate.
Nanomi's stake in MPPI increased from 51% to 56.3%; MPPI's turnover was PHP 2,096.6M.

news.title:
Lupin's subsidiary Multicare Pharmaceuticals Philippines repurchased 2.8M shares.
This buyback raised Nanomi's stake in MPPI from 51% to 56.3%.
news.summary:
Lupin's subsidiary Multicare Pharmaceuticals Philippines repurchased 2.8M shares.
This buyback raised Nanomi's stake in MPPI from 51% to 56.3%.

news.title:
Lupin secured U.S. FDA tentative approval for Pitolisant Tablets, bioequivalent to Wakix.
Lupin's shares traded at Rs. 2347.45 on BSE, with intraday high of Rs. 2360.
news.summary:
Lupin secured U.S. FDA tentative approval for Pitolisant Tablets, bioequivalent to Wakix.
Lupin's shares traded at Rs. 2347.45 on BSE, with intraday high of Rs. 2360.

news.title:
UBS highlights intense competition in generic GLP-1, impacting pharma stocks.
UBS rates Sun Pharma 'Buy', Cipla & Aurobindo 'Neutral', Dr Reddy’s, Lupin, Zydus 'Sell'.
news.summary:
UBS highlights intense competition in generic GLP-1, impacting pharma stocks.
UBS rates Sun Pharma 'Buy', Cipla & Aurobindo 'Neutral', Dr Reddy’s, Lupin, Zydus 'Sell'.

news.title:
Lupin gets tentative US FDA approval for Pitolisant tablets.
The drug addresses excessive daytime sleepiness treatment.
news.summary:
Lupin gets tentative US FDA approval for Pitolisant tablets.
The drug addresses excessive daytime sleepiness treatment.

news.title: Lupin's global CRDMO division is expanding its Dabhasa facility in Gujarat.
news.summary: Lupin's global CRDMO division is expanding its Dabhasa facility in Gujarat.

news.title:
Lupin expands Dabhasa unit, adding peptide and complex drug capabilities.
Expansion supports global demand and enhances contract manufacturing services.
news.summary:
Lupin expands Dabhasa unit, adding peptide and complex drug capabilities.
Expansion supports global demand and enhances contract manufacturing services.

news.title:
Lupin executed an NSE block trade of ~142,339 shares at Rs. 2300.2.
The trade totaled Rs. 32.74 Cr, showcasing significant investor activity.
news.summary:

news.title:
Generic drugmakers like Ajanta Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Lupin to launch semaglutide versions as Novo's patent expires.
Prices may drop 40-50%; healthcare facilities like Apollo, Fortis expand obesity services to meet rising demand.
news.summary:
Generic drugmakers like Ajanta Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Lupin to launch semaglutide versions as Novo's patent expires.
Prices may drop 40-50%; healthcare facilities like Apollo, Fortis expand obesity services to meet rising demand.

news.title:
Citi reports muted corporate credit demand despite West Asia oil shock, reflecting stronger post-pandemic balance sheets.
Indian firms pursue outbound M&A deals like Tata Motors-Iveco and Lupin-VISUfarma, leveraging improved access to capital.
news.summary:
Citi reports muted corporate credit demand despite West Asia oil shock, reflecting stronger post-pandemic balance sheets.
Indian firms pursue outbound M&A deals like Tata Motors-Iveco and Lupin-VISUfarma, leveraging improved access to capital.
